message:
feat(db): add query tracking and instrumentation module

Add QueryTracker with thread-safe atomic counters, per-table query
breakdown, and capped slow-query log (50 entries). Uses compiled regex
patterns via LazyLock for SQL table name extraction. Configurable
slow-query threshold with enable/disable at runtime. Mirrors the Python
QueryTracker for feature parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ serde_json.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
+regex.workspace = true
 
 # sqlmodel dependencies
 sqlmodel.workspace = true
